title: Useful Spears
description: Makes spears in Minecraft more useful! Launch yourself with Elytra just like a Riptide Trident, but without the need for rain.
body:
## UsefulSpear - Fly Without Rain!
> Tired of waiting for a thunderstorm to fly with your trident? UsefulSpear is a simple, vanilla-friendly mod that supercharges all spears, turning them into a powerful Elytra-launching tool, anytime, anywhere!

### Features
- Rain-Free Riptide: Launch yourself into the air with a fully-charged spear while wearing an Elytra. No rain or water required!
- Works With All Spears: From Wood to Netherite, every vanilla spear now has this powerful ability.
- Server & Client Ready: Works for both single-player and multiplayer. (Required on both server and client).
